## Goal

What do you want to enable?

## Why It Matters

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the change you have in mind.

## Scope

- package API
- tooling
- content workflow
- documentation
- distribution

## Notes

Add examples, tradeoffs, or references if useful.
